issue.message: Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `toLowerCase(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.

For locale "fr" (French) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1000000 de jours")

issue.errorLine1: <string name="settings_auto_delete_purge_confirm_body">%1$d message(s) older than %2$d days will be deleted. Starred messages are kept. This cannot be undone.</string>

issue.message: Using `getLine1Number` to get device identifiers is not recommended
Did you mean `android.permission.WRITE_OBB`?
Comment contains misleading Unicode bidirectional text
issue.errorLine1: // même destinataire visuel — sinon un caller fournissant `"+33‮6 12…"` peut

issue.message: Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
issue.errorLine1: val systemUri = if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.N) system.block(rawNumber) else null

issue.message: Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 24
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is never < 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 26
This folder configuration (`v24`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `drawable`.
This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 23
Unnecessary; `SDK_INT` is always >= 23
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`
Prefer `mutableIntStateOf` instead of `mutableStateOf`

issue.message: The resource `R.string.vault_explanation_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.vault_explanation_body` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="vault_explanation_body">Conversations you place here are hidden from the main list. They remain stored on your device (encrypted with SQLCipher). Note: SMS is unencrypted on the carrier network. For end-to-end encryption use Signal or Matrix.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="emergency_call_behavior_desc">Choose how the emergency call buttons act when tapped.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_dialer_only` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_dialer_only_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="emergency_call_behavior_dialer_only_desc">Tap opens the phone app with the number pre-filled. You tap the green button to actually call. No special permission. Default.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_hold_3s` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.emergency_call_behavior_hold_3s_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="emergency_call_behavior_hold_3s_desc">Hold the button 3 seconds → immediate call to 112 or 17 without confirmation. Requires the CALL_PHONE permission. Anti-pocket-dial via mandatory hold-3s.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.emergency_call_permission_request_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.emergency_call_permission_request_body` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="emergency_call_permission_request_body">To enable hold-3s direct call, SMS Tech needs the CALL_PHONE permission. If you refuse, the buttons will keep their default behavior (open dialer).</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.emergency_call_phone_permission_request` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.emergency_call_phone_permission_body` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="emergency_call_phone_permission_body">To call 112 / 15 / 17 / 18 directly without going through the dialer, SMS Tech needs the CALL_PHONE permission. If you refuse, taps will fall back to the dialer (you confirm).</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.backup_restore_coming_v11` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="backup_restore_coming_v11">Restore from encrypted file lands in v1.1 — current export already produces a fully self-contained file.</string>

The image `ic_launcher.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher.png: 515x515 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher.png: 772x772 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 386x386 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 257x257 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher.png: 193x193 dp (772x772 px)

The image `ic_launcher_round.png` varies significantly in its density-independent (dip) size across the various density versions: mipmap-hdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 515x515 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-mdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 772x772 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 386x386 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 257x257 dp (772x772 px), mipmap-xxxhdpi/ic_launcher_round.png: 193x193 dp (772x772 px)
